title: Han Feizi: The Five Vermin
description: The coldest political philosophy ever written: virtue is useless, only laws and punishments can govern men.
introduction: The coldest political philosophy ever written: virtue is useless, only laws and punishments can govern men.

translation.original_text: 上古競於道德，中世逐於智謀，當今爭於氣力。
translation.text: In high antiquity men competed in virtue. In the middle ages they pursued in cleverness. Today they struggle with force.
